name: Neewer GL1C RGB Game Panel Light
description: 2.4G/WiFi/Bluetooth 3 Ways App Connections- Download our latest 'NEEWER Control Center' software on your PC/MAC for 2.4G (without network) or WiFi connectivity. 2.4GSimply plug in the 2.4G USB transmitter to your computer.

features.Key Features:: Model: GL1C | Number of LEDs: 144 | Input Voltage: DC12-15V | Maximum Power: 48W | Maximum Illuminance: 4300lux/0.5m | CRI: 97+ | Dimming Range: 0-100% | Color Temperature: 2900K-7000K | GM Correction Values: 50 | Hue: 0-360 | Saturation: 0-100 | Number of FX Scenes: 18 | Channels: 0-10 | Dimensions: 15"x9.1"x1.6"/38x23x4cm | Weight: 3.3lb/1.5kg
features.What's In The Box?: 1 x GL1C RGB LED Streaming Light | 1 x Power Adapter | 1 x Power Cord | 1 x Desktop Stand | 1 x Ball Head Adapter
